summary: Processing time for these disability rent-freeze applications spiked in fiscal 2023 for the same reason as the related senior program: DOF kept extending benefits for people who couldn't submit renewal paperwork during the pandemic rather than cutting them off, which built up a backlog just as processing staff levels dropped. DOF's later reports say times came back down through fiscal 2025 as the agency shifted staff and added automation.

sources.label: NYC Department of Finance, Fiscal 2023 Mayor's Management Report
NYC Department of Finance, Fiscal 2024 Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: decreasing since a pandemic-era backlog cleared and DOF added automation
